name: mine_iron_count

prior.name: get_self_status
prior.reasoning: check that I have a pickaxe before mining

note: pickaxe equipped → mine directly; count=10; block_ids contains an iron ore (acceptable-set demo)

name: drop_cobblestone

prior.content: 把背包里的鹅卵石都扔了，太占地方

prior.name: get_self_status
prior.reasoning: check how much cobblestone I carry

note: inventory confirmed → drop_items the cobblestone

name: reuse_known_furnace

prior.content: 用之前那个熔炉烧点铁

prior.name: get_self_status
prior.reasoning: check I have raw iron and fuel

note: has iron+fuel and a remembered furnace → interact_at its coords, NOT move_to (prompt forbids move_to onto a station)

name: break_specific_block

prior.content: 把坐标 10 64 10 那一块石头敲掉

prior.name: get_self_status
prior.reasoning: confirm I have a pickaxe equipped

note: single exact cell with a pickaxe ready → break_block, NOT auto_mine (which gathers by type)

name: eat_to_heal

prior.name: get_self_status
prior.reasoning: check hunger and what food I have

note: hungry + has cooked_beef → eat_item, NOT interact_at

name: equip_iron_sword

prior.name: get_self_status
prior.reasoning: confirm the iron sword is in my inventory

note: sword confirmed in inventory → equip_item it to mainhand

name: self_status
request: 你现在血量和装备怎么样？
note: verify before claiming; one call covers hp+equipment+inventory

name: scan_mobs
note: perception query, not combat yet

name: lookup_recipe_pickaxe
note: recipe lookup; item_id acceptable-set (with or without namespace)

name: locate_stronghold
request: 帮我找最近的要塞在哪
note: structure id acceptable-set (with or without namespace)

name: wait_in_place
note: wait ~30s in place

name: come_to_owner
note: may need owner coords first (get_owner_status) then move_to

name: real_scan_then_act

prior.content: 帮我弄点木头，准备升级装备

prior.name: scan_blocks
prior.reasoning: find the nearest logs to harvest

note: mined from real log 00f3e9e9: after a scan finds logs, act on them (navigate or mine) — do NOT re-scan or stall

name: craft_workbench

prior.name: get_self_status
prior.reasoning: check I have planks to craft with

note: guards the crafting workflow after it's removed from the system prompt — model must still enter crafting via lookup_recipe/inspect_gui (their descriptions carry the how-to)

name: neg_chit_chat
request: 今天天气真好啊，你说是不是
note: pure chit-chat → reply in text, call NO tool

name: neg_thanks
request: 刚才辛苦你了，干得漂亮，谢谢！
note: praise/thanks → acknowledge in text, no tool

name: neg_vague
note: too vague to act → should ask a clarifying question, not guess a tool

name: neg_out_of_scope
request: 你能帮我把这个世界备份到云端吗？
note: no tool can do this → explain it can't, don't force an unrelated tool

name: neg_game_knowledge
request: 钻石一般在哪一层比较多？
note: tool-tempting (scan_blocks/get_world_info) but it's general game knowledge → just answer; scanning the world won't tell you where diamonds GENERALLY are

name: neg_opinion
request: 你觉得钻石剑和下界合金剑，哪个更厉害？
note: opinion/knowledge about item tiers → answer from knowledge, no tool (don't get_self_status to inspect a sword the owner didn't ask about)
